flowcharts.title: Stage IA1, No LVSI - Fertility Sparing

nodes.label: Stage IA1, No LVSI - Fertility Sparing
Stage IA1 (no LVSI) on cone biopsy with negative margins (preferred non-fragmented specimen with at least 1-mm margins); patient desires fertility preservation.
Observe (Surveillance, Preferred, Category 2A)
Cone biopsy (CKC preferred, LEEP acceptable) + SLN mapping or pelvic lymphadenectomy (Surgery, Preferred, Category 2A)

flowcharts.title: Stage IA1, No LVSI - Non-Fertility Sparing

nodes.label: Stage IA1, No LVSI - Non-Fertility Sparing
Stage IA1 (no LVSI) on cone biopsy. Negative margins and medically inoperable.
Negative margins and medically operable.
Positive margins for carcinoma and medically inoperable.
Positive margins for dysplasia or carcinoma and medically operable.
Observe (Surveillance, Preferred, Category 2A)
Type A hysterectomy (Surgery, Preferred, Category 2A)
Repeat cone biopsy (preferred) or Brachytherapy ± pelvic EBRT (Surgery/RT, Preferred, Category 2A)

Consider repeat cone biopsy; or Type A hysterectomy (if margins positive for dysplasia) + SLN mapping or pelvic lymphadenectomy; or Type B radical hysterectomy (if margins positive for carcinoma) + SLN mapping or pelvic lymphadenectomy (Surgery, Preferred, Category 2A). Adjuvant: Proceed to adjuvant treatment assessment based on surgical findings (CERV-6).

edges.label: Positive margins for carcinoma, medically inoperable
Positive margins for dysplasia or carcinoma, medically operable

nodes.label: Stage IA1, With LVSI
Stage IA1 with LVSI based on cone/LEEP. Patient desires fertility preservation.
Stage IA1 with LVSI, negative margins (or when specimen integrity unknown). Non-fertility sparing.
Stage IA1 with LVSI, positive margins for dysplasia or carcinoma. Non-fertility sparing.
Cone biopsy (with negative margins) + pelvic SLN mapping/lymphadenectomy (Surgery, Preferred, Category 2A)
Type A hysterectomy + SLN mapping or pelvic lymphadenectomy (Surgery, Preferred, Category 2A). Adjuvant: For surgical pathway, proceed to adjuvant treatment assessment based on findings (CERV-6).
Pelvic EBRT ± brachytherapy ± concurrent platinum-containing chemotherapy (Radiation, Other recommended, Category 2A)

Consider repeat cone biopsy; or Type A hysterectomy (if margins positive for dysplasia) + SLN mapping or pelvic lymphadenectomy; or Type B radical hysterectomy (if margins positive for carcinoma) + SLN mapping or pelvic lymphadenectomy (Surgery, Preferred, Category 2A). Adjuvant: Proceed to adjuvant treatment assessment based on surgical findings (CERV-6).

edges.label: Non-fertility sparing, negative margins or specimen integrity unknown

nodes.label: Stage IA2-IB1, Fertility Sparing

Stage IA2-IB1 based on cone biopsy; all conservative surgery criteria must be met: No LVSI (preferred), negative cone margins for cancer (preferred), squamous cell (any grade) or usual type adenocarcinoma (grade 1 or 2 only) (preferred), tumor size ≤2 cm, depth of invasion ≤10 mm on LEEP/cone, negative imaging for locoregional disease (MRI recommended).
Cone biopsy with negative margins + SLN mapping (if risk factors); or Radical trachelectomy + SLN mapping (Surgery, Preferred, Category 2A)
